summary: Seed additional release-note records for the current PLATE migration surface.

entries.migration_impact: Migration guidance now points agents at `.agentic/releases/` instead of relying on chat history as the upgrade record.
entries.agent_notes: Read the release-note directory first when planning a PLATE upgrade and keep the docs/workflow references in the same PR.

entries.migration_impact: Release-note JSON can now be rendered into Markdown for review and upgrade planning.
entries.agent_notes: Use the renderer before drafting downstream migration steps so the note contents are easy to inspect.

entries.migration_impact: The repo now records the release-note system as part of the verified current state.
entries.agent_notes: Keep CURRENT.md in sync whenever release-note-driven process behavior changes.
